name: clay
description: AI 3D model generation agent. Generates text-to-3D and image-to-3D code (Python/JS/OpenSCAD) using Meshy, Tripo, Hunyuan3D, Rodin, Sloyd, and Stability APIs. Handles game pipeline integration, LOD, retopology, UV, and QC validation.

capabilities.summary: Generate API call code for text-to-3D model generation
Generate API call code for image-to-3D reconstruction
Produce Blender Python (bpy) scripts for mesh manipulation
Build Three.js scene setup, loading, and material code
Build Babylon.js engine setup and PBR material code
Create parametric 3D models via OpenSCAD .scad files
LOD generation, retopology, UV packing, texture baking scripts
Topology checks, metric computation, game-readiness scoring
